bug_enemies.name: Worker Bug

special_abilities.name: Swarm Tactics
special_abilities.effect: When 3+ Worker Bugs are within 2" of same target, they gain +1 to hit

special_abilities.name: Expendable
special_abilities.effect: Other bugs ignore morale checks when Workers are killed

bug_enemies.ai_behavior: Move towards nearest soldier. Always charges if within 8".

bug_enemies.name: Soldier Bug

special_abilities.name: Armored Carapace
special_abilities.effect: 6+ armor save due to thick chitin plates

special_abilities.name: Rending Strike
special_abilities.effect: On a natural 6 to hit in melee, deals +1 damage

special_abilities.name: Coordinated Attack
special_abilities.effect: Can perform move and charge in same activation

bug_enemies.ai_behavior: Prioritizes engaged targets. Uses cover if available. Charges when within 6".

bug_enemies.name: Hunter Bug

special_abilities.name: Stealth
special_abilities.effect: Cannot be detected by Motion Tracker until it attacks or moves within 6" of a soldier

special_abilities.name: Ambush Predator
special_abilities.effect: First attack each battle is made with +2 to hit if attacking from cover or concealment

special_abilities.name: Swift
special_abilities.effect: Can disengage from melee without penalty

bug_enemies.ai_behavior: Stalks isolated targets. Attacks from flanks. Withdraws if outnumbered.

bug_enemies.name: Spitter Bug

special_abilities.name: Acid Spit
special_abilities.effect: 12" ranged attack. Ignores cover bonuses. Targets hit must pass Toughness save or take 1 additional damage

special_abilities.name: Acid Pool
special_abilities.effect: When killed, leaves 2" acid pool dealing 1 damage per round to anyone in contact

special_abilities.name: Area Denial
special_abilities.effect: Can spray acid in 4" cone instead of normal attack (hits all in area, no cover)

bug_enemies.ai_behavior: Maintains range. Seeks high ground. Retreats if charged.

bug_enemies.name: Heavy Bug

special_abilities.name: Heavily Armored
special_abilities.effect: 5+ armor save. Immune to Stun effects

special_abilities.name: Charge
special_abilities.effect: If moves 4"+ in straight line before melee, deals +2 damage on first attack

special_abilities.name: Unstoppable
special_abilities.effect: Ignores difficult terrain. Destroys cover when charging through it

bug_enemies.ai_behavior: Charges shortest path to enemy. Targets groups over individuals. Never retreats.

bug_enemies.name: Flying Bug

special_abilities.name: Flight
special_abilities.effect: Ignores all terrain. Can move over other models

special_abilities.name: Dive Attack
special_abilities.effect: If moved 6"+ this turn, first melee attack gains +1 to hit and +1 damage

special_abilities.name: Hard to Hit
special_abilities.effect: Enemies shooting at Flying Bugs suffer -1 to hit while they're airborne

bug_enemies.ai_behavior: Circles above battlefield. Dives on isolated or wounded soldiers. Evades melee combat.

bug_enemies.name: Bug Queen

special_abilities.name: Command Aura
special_abilities.effect: All bugs within 12" gain +1 Reactions and re-roll failed morale checks

special_abilities.name: Spawn Workers
special_abilities.effect: At start of each round, spawns 1D3 Worker Bugs within 3" of Queen

special_abilities.name: Massive
special_abilities.effect: Counts as Large model (4" base). Immune to knockback and stunning

special_abilities.name: Regeneration
special_abilities.effect: Heals 1 damage at start of each round if not killed

bug_enemies.ai_behavior: Protects nest. Spawns workers. Focuses attacks on highest threat. Fights to death.

bug_enemies.name: Infested Human

special_abilities.name: Unpredictable
special_abilities.effect: Roll 1D6 at start of activation: 1-2 moves randomly, 3-4 attacks nearest target (friend or foe), 5-6 acts normally

special_abilities.name: Parasite Burst
special_abilities.effect: When killed, roll 1D6. On 5-6, parasite emerges and attacks nearest model (deal 1 damage, no armor save)

special_abilities.name: Horrifying
special_abilities.effect: Soldiers within 6" must pass Morale check or suffer -1 to all actions this round

bug_enemies.ai_behavior: Erratic movement. May attack allies. Self-preservation instinct absent.

bug_deployment_rules.standard_deployment: Roll on Bug Type table based on deployment points available
bug_deployment_rules.swarm_deployment: Primarily Worker Bugs with occasional elites (75% Workers, 25% others)
bug_deployment_rules.elite_deployment: Higher proportion of Soldier, Hunter, and Heavy Bugs
bug_deployment_rules.hive_deployment: Balanced mix centered around Queen (requires 15+ deployment points)

ai_priority_system.description: Bug AI uses simple priority-based system

special_behaviors.queen_present: All bugs prioritize protecting Queen and staying within command aura
special_behaviors.hive_threatened: Bugs become more aggressive, gain +1 Speed
special_behaviors.squad_broken: If 50%+ bugs killed, remaining bugs make morale check or flee
